title: External Modulation Frameworks for Predictable, Stable, and Safer Battery Systems
description: A systems-oriented framework exploring external modulation methods for improving battery predictability, operational stability, and safety.

title: Authenticated Logic-Zero Encoding via Passive Current Signature for Robust Low Voltage Signaling
description: A proposed signaling approach using passive current signatures to improve authentication and robustness in low-voltage logic systems.

title: Seabed-Anchored Adaptive Ocean Energy Network
description: A theoretical ocean-energy architecture using seabed reaction structures, adaptive tethered collectors, mechanical motion rectification, and distributed subsea power networks.
